title: Department Manager Vacancy at Metro Shoes - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Metro Shoes - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Metro Shoes! We are hiring a Department Manager for our Amritsar team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Metro Shoes:
Metro Shoes is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Metro Shoes!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
